name: Homemade Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large sifter, combine the flour, sugar, cornstarch, baking powder, and salt.
2. Sift into a large bowl in batches using a pastry blender or heavy duty mixer.
3. Blend in the shortening until the mixture resembles cornmeal in texture.
4. Spoon into a container with 20-cup capacity and tight fitting lid.
5. Seal container; label with date and contents.
6. Store in a cool, dry place. Use within 10-12 weeks.
Makes about 17 cups of Homemade Cake Mix.
